description: This file defines each Unique item and controls their item modifiers. The row order of items should not be changed because it defines their ID value. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: index
columns.description: Points to a string key value to use as the Unique item's name

columns.name: version
columns.description: Defines which game version to create this item (<100 = Classic mode | 100 = Expansion mode)

columns.name: disabled
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, this unique is fully disabled and cannot be dropped randomly or explicitly from a treasure class.

columns.name: spawnable
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then this item can be rolled as a choice when randomly dropping a unique. If equals 0, then this item cannot be dropped randomly, but can still be drop explicitly from a treasure class.

columns.name: disableChronicle
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, this unique item will not appear in the chronicle.

columns.name: DropConditionCalc
columns.description: If the evaluated result of this condition is 0, then prevent the unique from being rolled as a choice when randomly dropping a unique. Treasure Class scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: firstLadderSeason
columns.description: Integer field. The first ladder season the unique item can be Dropped or created on (inclusive). If blank or 0 then it is available in non-ladder.

columns.name: lastLadderSeason
columns.description: Integer field. The last ladder season the unique item is ladder-only (inclusive). Must be used in conjunction with .firstLadderSeason.

columns.name: rarity
columns.description: Modifies the chances that this Unique item will spawn compared to the other Unique items. This value acts as a numerator and a denominator. Each .rarity value gets summed together to give a total denominator, used for the random roll for the item. For example, if there are 3 possible Unique items, and their .rarity values are 3, 5, 7, then their chances to be chosen are 3/15, 5/15, and 7/15 respectively. (The minimum .rarity value equals 1) (Only works for games in Expansion mode)

columns.name: nolimit
columns.description: Boolean Field. Requires the misc.quest field to be enabled. If equals 1, then this item can be created and will automatically be identified. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: lvl
columns.description: The item level for the item, which controls what object or monster needs to be in order to drop this item

columns.name: lvl req
columns.description: The minimum character level required to equip the item

columns.name: code
columns.description: Defines the baseline item code to use for this Unique item (must match the armor.code, weapons.code, or misc.code field)

columns.name: carry1
columns.description: Assigns the Unique item to a group. Players can only carry one item from each group in their inventory.

columns.name: cost mult
columns.description: Multiplicative modifier for the Unique item's buy, sell, and repair costs

columns.name: cost add
columns.description: Flat integer modification to the Unique item's buy, sell, and repair costs. This is added after the .cost mult has modified the costs.

columns.name: chrtransform
columns.description: Controls the color change of the item when equipped on a character or dropped on the ground. If empty, then the item will have the default item color.

columns.name: invtransform
columns.description: Controls the color change of the item in the inventory UI. If empty, then the item will have the default item color.

columns.name: flippyfile
columns.description: An override for the armor.flippyfile, weapons.flippyfile, or misc.flippyfile field. By default, the Unique item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .code field.

columns.name: invfile
columns.description: An override for the armor.invfile, weapons.invfile, or misc.invfile field. By default, the Unique item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .code field.

columns.name: dropsound
columns.description: An override for the armor.dropsound, weapons.dropsound, or misc.dropsound field. By default, the Unique item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .code field.

columns.name: dropsfxframe
columns.description: An override for the armor.dropsfxframe, weapons.dropsfxframe, or misc.dropsfxframe field. By default, the Unique item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .code field.

columns.name: usesound
columns.description: An override for the armor.usesound, weapons.usesound, or misc.usesound field. By default, the Unique item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .code field.

columns.name: prop1
columns.description: Controls the item properties for the Unique item References a properties.code or a PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: par1
columns.description: The stat's "parameter" value associated with the related property (.prop#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field) A number or references skills.skill, montype.type, or states.state

columns.name: min1
columns.description: The stat's "min" value to assign to the related property (.prop#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: max1
columns.description: The stat's "max" value to assign to the related property (.prop#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: diablocloneweight
columns.description: The amount of weight added to the diablo clone progress when this item is sold. When offline, selling this item will instead immediately spawn diablo clone.
